about.title: How it works
about.subtitle: High-quality downloads in three steps.
about.step1.title: Paste the link
about.step1.desc: Copy a media link from YouTube, TikTok, Twitter/X, Reddit and hundreds of sites, then paste it into the box.
about.step2.title: Pick format & quality
about.step2.desc: Choose MP4 video (up to 4K) or MP3 audio (320 kbps). Set the resolution for video.
about.step3.title: Download
about.step3.desc: The server prepares the content, you watch the progress live, and the file is saved to your device.
about.limits.title: Daily limits
about.limits.member: Free members: 100 downloads per day + download history.
about.legal: BLGNTube is an educational project and uses the open-source yt-dlp engine. Only download content you are legally allowed to.
